title: WSL refactoring
body:
Small amount of refactoring to make WSL specific stuff into the WSL package where possible.  This is in preparation for the possibility of adding more virtualization backends.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

```release-note
None
```
